data.title: Cleanup claude-code-documentation Plugin
data.description:
# Cleanup claude-code-documentation Plugin

## Problem Statement

The claude-code-documentation plugin needs review and cleanup as part of the marketplace-wide plugin audit. Need to verify structure, documentation, and ensure it follows marketplace conventions.

## Findings

* Plugin located at `plugins/claude-code-documentation/`
* Part of marketplace plugin collection
* Needs audit for: structure, documentation, unused code, performance

## Proposed Solutions

### Option 1: Audit and Document As-Is

**Approach:** Review current state, document what it does, remove unused code.

**Pros:**

* Low effort
* Keeps existing functionality

**Cons:**

* May not align with marketplace standards

**Effort:** 1-2 hours
**Risk:** Low

### Option 2: Refactor to Standards

**Approach:** Update to match marketplace conventions and best practices.

**Pros:**

* Consistent with other plugins
* Better maintainability

**Cons:**

* Higher effort
* Potential breaking changes

**Effort:** 3-4 hours
**Risk:** Medium

## Recommended Action

Audit plugin structure, update documentation, remove unused files, ensure follows marketplace naming/structure conventions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Plugin structure reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, [SKILL.md](<http://SKILL.md>) if applicable)
- [ ] Unused files removed
- [ ] Follows marketplace conventions
- [ ] Tested functionality works

## Work Log

### 2026-01-04 - Todo Created

**By:** Claude Code

**Actions:**

* Created cleanup todo as part of plugin audit initiative
